title: Salty Jamaican Okra Soup
description: A light, monsoon‑inspired Jamaican okra soup with a subtle salty kick, cooked sous‑vide for silky texture and finished with miniature sugar‑based marshmallows.
instructions: Season the sliced okra with salt, pepper, turmeric, dried thyme, and allspice.
Place the seasoned okra in a vacuum‑seal bag and pour in coconut milk and vegetable broth.
Add tamarind paste to the bag, seal, and vacuum‑seal.
Cook the bag sous‑vide for 60 minutes to gently infuse flavors and tenderize the okra.
Remove the bag, open it carefully, and transfer the contents to a medium saucepan.
Bring the mixture to a gentle simmer for 5 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Add the miniature marshmallows to the simmering soup, stirring until they melt and create a subtle airy texture.
Taste and adjust seasoning with additional salt or lime juice if desired.
Serve hot, garnished with a sprinkle of fresh thyme or chopped scallions if tolerated.
